title: 2015-2017 Ineffective Assistance of Counsel and Plea Withdrawal in Washington State
content:
# 2015-2017 Ineffective Assistance of Counsel and Plea Withdrawal in Washington State

This analysis examines ineffective assistance of counsel claims and plea withdrawal proceedings under Washington State law.

## Legal Framework

- Strickland v. Washington standard
- Washington State CrR 4.2(f) plea withdrawal rules
- Sixth Amendment right to effective counsel

## Patricia Fulton Representation Issues

- Failure to investigate
- Failure to communicate
- Coerced plea entry
- Conflict of interest concerns

## Remedies Sought

- Plea withdrawal motion
- State bar complaint
- Civil rights claims
